creator: bahlgren@beah.se
text:
I have a server with only IPv6 connectivity.

"portsnap fetch" quickly fails fetching the snapshot tag from ipv4.aws.portsnap.freebsd.org (as it should), but then hangs quite some time trying ipv6.aws.portsnap.freebsd.org.  None of the three server addresses behind that name seem to respond!

After timing out, it successfully fetches from your-org.portsnap.freebsd.org.

Can ipv6.aws.portsnap.freebsd.org please be made to work as a portsnap source?
